title: Get to Know Me
text: I’m a software developer with over 15 years of experience building reliable, scalable digital solutions. I specialize in creating high-performing web and mobile applications with a strong focus on simplicity, usability, and long-term maintainability.
text2: Over the years, I’ve worked across diverse projects—turning complex ideas into clean, efficient code. I enjoy solving challenging problems, adopting new technologies, and delivering solutions that create real impact.
